$comment: TIP-1.0 route-class cache-policy buckets. Canonical authoring source for the per-route semantic cache policy. Vendored byte-identical into tokenpak/tip/schemas/tip-route-class-cache-policy.v1.json for runtime consumption. Maps each route class from tip-route-class.v1.json to a semantic cache-policy bucket plus optional per-route similarity threshold. Consumed by tokenpak.services.optimization.cache_policy.

response_reuse.description: Response reuse allowed with conservative per-route similarity thresholds.

context_reuse_only.description: Response reuse off; semantic context reuse allowed. Default bucket for unclassified routes.

lossless.description: Lossless fidelity required — semantic matching disabled entirely.
